name: Boston Chicken Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 medium cucumbers, skin on; halved and sliced into 1/2 inch pieces
1/4 red Spanish onion; diced into 1/2 inch dice
8 oz Paul Newman's Olive Oil and Vinegar Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cucumbers with the rest of the ingredients in a non-metal refrigerator container.
2. Tightly cover and refrigerate for 24 hours before serving.
3. Do not freeze.
